title: LU Decomposition
description: Factor matrix into lower and upper triangular matrices
mermaid: graph TD A1[Input: Square Matrix A (n x n)] --> B1["Initialize: L = I (n x n), U = A (n x n)"] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1[i = 0] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 --> D1{i < n - 1?} style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 D1 -- Yes --> E1[j = i + 1] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 --> F1{j < n?} style F1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 F1 -- Yes --> G1[factor = U[j][i] / U[i][i]] style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff G1 --> H1[L[j][i] = factor] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1[k = i] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff I1 --> J1{k < n?} style J1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 J1 -- Yes --> K1[U[j][k] = U[j][k] - factor * U[i][k]] style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> L1[k = k + 1] style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 --> J1 J1 -- No --> M1[j = j + 1] style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1 --> F1 F1 -- No --> N1[i = i + 1] style N1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff N1 --> D1 D1 -- No --> O1[Output: L (Lower Triangular), U (Upper Triangular)] style O1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
